name: Drivecord
subtitle: Unlimited cloud storage via Discord
description: Official source for Drivecord — unlimited file storage powered by Discord webhooks.

apps.name: Drivecord
apps.subtitle: Unlimited storage via Discord
apps.localizedDescription:
Drivecord turns Discord webhooks into unlimited cloud storage.

FEATURES
- Unlimited storage via Discord webhooks
- Chunked parallel upload, no file size limit
- In-app preview: images, video (incl. .mov/HEIC), audio, PDF
- Folders, tags, favorites and search
- Cross-device sync — same account, same files everywhere
- Dark mode, drag & drop, mobile-first UI

Connect your Discord webhook and store anything.

versions.localizedDescription: Initial release of Drivecord for iOS.
